title: あまあま☆ニガニガ☆黒魔法！

text_block_list.text:
I hear that there's a cold going around. Then, just
as I start to think my own throat's feeling a little
irritated...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ACHOO!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, you got sick too?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... And I usually pride myself on my good
health. I guess I caught this from someone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No two ways about it, you're gonna need this. It's
my specially made magical cough drop! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's completely black. But it does look
effective. Bottoms up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Blegh! What the heck is this?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It tastes like... medicine? A rubber band? A tire?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's black licorice. Most people here in
Japan hate how it tastes, but in Europe it's
famous for treating coughs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Gross or not, it really does work, you know! So
give it a try.

A black cough drop that tastes like a tire...
Doesn't sound too appealing, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. You look like you're about to sneeze.
Take a cough drop!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you getting so worked up about? I'm
doing you a favor! Eat it already!

With Sweep Tosho being so considerate, I can't
refuse her. I make up my mind and pop the black
drop into my mouth.

Augh! It tastes like medicine but it has the texture
of a tire!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aha! ♪ I can tell from your face that it's working
its magic!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! Take some deep breaths! In! Out!
In! Out!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sweep! You're still at it with your infamous
magic cough drops?!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, is that trainer all right? That's a face that
says "suffering" if I've ever seen one!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, riiight? I'll go get you some water. Oh and
watch out, chewing makes it worse!

Students begin to gather around us, perhaps
drawn by my look of profound discomfort.

As I drink some water and slowly regain my
composure...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Compared to when they were complaining
about colds and stuff, everyone looks a little
better now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No wonder Granny always called it magic
candy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That stuff I gave you! Granny's a great witch, and
she told me that candy always brings laughter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And that laughter made everyone feel a little
better, right? That's what my magic's all about! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you look like you want some more. Okay,
here's another!
choice_data_list: Well, I guess I could try one more...

text_block_list.text:
Magic that brings laughter to everyone around
you. Just as I start to think that's actually quite a
nice idea...
...The awful taste brings tears to my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You should have stopped when you had
the chance!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Hey, just spit it out and drink some water!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! A licorice a day keeps the doctor away! ♪

But I find myself completely unable to reach out
for it... Perhaps my whole body has been
traumatized by the taste!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Why's your hand shaking like that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Okay, as an extra special favor, I'll
leave you alone for today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But that means the rest of you have to eat what's
left.

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text: What? We do?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Duh! Now open up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine. Okay, here it comes... BLEGH. It tastes
just like a rubber band!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
No way! It tastes like a tire! A really worn-out
one!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Come on, what does that even mean?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aww, don't be like that.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Fine. Then, I'll just have to find someone else to—
Hehe, wait just a moment there, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've been developing a new supplement, but the
taste has been scaring off test subjects.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which has me thinking now... If one were to taste
something even worse beforehand, that could
potentially make the supplement taste good by
comparison.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps even this Universal Amino Capsule will
finally be rendered edible?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, you really have a screw loose up there.
But then again...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That sounds super fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Then, let us begin, Sweep! Commence pincer
attack!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: On it! Let's go!

In a merciless but splendidly coordinated
operation, the two try to catch me. I call for help
from Kitasan Black and manage to escape the
ordeal unscathed...
